name: Jessalyn Reid
subject: an actual email from me to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
This is not a "cookie cutter" fundraising email that was written by a consulting firm - in fact, you should know that none of the emails we send you are. This is an actual email, written by me, Jess.
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hey Derek:

This is not a "cookie cutter" fundraising email that was written by a consulting firm - in fact, you should know that none of the emails we send you are. This is an actual email, written by me, Jess, to you, Derek.

And _this_ is not a graphic whipped up by a team of designers. This is an actual screenshot, copy and pasted into this email. It's copied from a spreadsheet I stare at pretty much all day, titled "Email Fundraising" (we're not very creative with our spreadsheet naming). _And what this percentage and progress bar represents is our "percent-to-goal" for our September fundraising goal:_ [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11b5/3e0906/70f4fcc2/3e36178d/3980619911/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&source=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND") I'm sharing this with you because I am legitimately concerned that we won't get that red bar all the way to 100% in the next 9 days. [Can you pitch in any amount - seriously, whatever you can afford - right now?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11b5/3e0906/70f4fcc2/3e36178c/3980619911/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+pitch+in+any+amount++seriously+w&utm_campaign=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&source=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND")

I know what you're thinking: Can't Tim Kaine win without my hard-earned spare dollars?

The answer to that is: _Maybe._

But when we say "Maybe," that also means, "Maybe not." **We just don 't know.** Whether the polls show Tim up by a whole lot, or the race narrowing to less than 5 points, the truth is (and this is an expression we say every day at Kaine HQ): _The only poll that matters is the one on Election Day._

**So "Maybe" just isn't good enough.** We need to be able to know FOR SURE that we are doing enough to keep Corey Stewart out of the U.S. Senate. And right now, we don't.

[So I'm asking you today to please dig deep and pitch in to get us to 100% to goal.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11b5/3e0906/70f4fcc2/3e361783/3980619911/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+So+Irsquom+asking+you+today+to+please+di&utm_campaign=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&source=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11b5/3e0906/70f4fcc2/3e361782/3980619911/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+5&utm_campaign=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&source=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND")

| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11b5/3e0906/70f4fcc2/3e361785/3980619911/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&source=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND")

Your donations do so, so much. They get our TV ads up on the air in markets all across Virginia. They allow us to run a sophisticated, targeted digital advertising program. They keep the lights on in our 20+ field offices across the Commonwealth.

And besides all that, you should know that your contributions to Tim are about so much more than just him - they also support all ELEVEN Democrats running for the House here in Virginia. Including districts we never before imagined were flippable, but now have an actual chance of winning!

So seriously - from the bottom of my heart (and I am not an earnest person usually): **THANK YOU.**

I know it's exhausting to keep up with politics these days. I know it's exhausting to even check your email these days! But I hope you know that I personally appreciate every time you open one of these emails, whether or not you're able to click that "donate" button.

_Please stick with us._

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Final-Quarterly-Public-Deadline](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11b5/3e0906/70f4fcc2/3e361784/3980619911/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+httpssecuretimkainecomFinalQuarterlyPubl&utm_campaign=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND&source=20180921_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND")

_-Jess_

Jessalyn Reid
Digital Director
Kaine for Virginia

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: Did you watch the debate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Beto just got off the debate stage in Dallas, and I bet he made you proud.
He presented his vision for Texas and showed everyone who’s watching what
our grassroots campaign is all about.

If you were watching, you’ll know: the contrast between Beto and Senator
Cruz has never been more stark.

Beto is the only candidate in this race who’s made it a priority to listen
to Texans across all 254 counties to learn more about the issues that
matter to them, their families and their communities. And it shows.

Since day 1, Beto’s been on the road across the state hosting hundreds of
town halls, where anyone -- Democrats, Republicans, Independents and
non-voters alike -- can ask any question or level any criticism. And Beto
is the only candidate in this race who’s prioritizing real people -- not
special-interest groups or PACs.

Next week is our final end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline of this
campaign, and everything’s on the line. Recent polls show Beto within
single digits of Cruz -- and one poll showed Beto down one point. Your
donation matters now more than ever.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8812?refcode=em20180921&t=1019&akid=11901%2E444211%2E0TaEGt ]Help us keep up tonight's momentum with a donation of
$3
or more. Chip in now »

Can’t wait to see the headlines after tonight’s debate. I’ll send the best
ones your way.

Talk soon,

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

# _REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_
##
**[Hispanics Flourishing in Trump Economy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIyLjk1MjM0MjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMi45NTIzNDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5NTE0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/alfredo-ortiz-hispanics-flourishing-trump-economy/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr)** _-The Hill_ “President Trump's economy is the rising tide that is lifting all boats. This is especially true for Hispanics, who were among the biggest victims of the low-growth, high-regulation economy under President Obama,” Job Creators Network CEO Alfredo Ortiz writes, citing recent reports that median income for Hispanic households grew nearly 4 percent last year.
##
**[Dow, S&P Surge to Record Closes as Economy Steams Ahead](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIyLjk1MjM0MjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMi45NTIzNDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5NTE0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonpost.com/business/economy/dow-sandp-surge-to-record-closes-as-economy-steams-ahead/2018/09/20/00a95a3a-bd10-11e8-be70-52bd11fe18af_story.html)** _-The Washington Post_ “U.S. stock markets smashed records Thursday,” Thomas Heath reports, as investors “tuned out politics” and focused on “a flourishing economy.” Both the S&P 500 and Dow Jones industrial average closed at record highs. “It’s the S&P’s 19th record close this year and its 89th since the 2016 elections. The Dow recorded its 12th closing high of the year and its 100th new high since the presidential election.”

Jessica believes that the people of our district deserve to hear directly from the candidates, but so far McClintock hasn't accepted her challenge to do several debates across the district, **and has even _withdrawn_ from the only other scheduled debate--so there's a high chance this might be _the only debate_ to take place.**
With that in mind, Jessica's been hard at work preparing, and it would mean so much to her to know you have her back by being on her Debate Team.

name: Petitions@TimKaine.com
subject: Teacher shortage crisis - we've had enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
As Tim travels around Virginia meeting with voters he hears the same urgent, resounding concern: Our teacher shortage, and lack of resources available to current teachers, is at an all-time crisis. --
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Virginia's teachers need our support now more than ever.[Sign your name and help show teachers that all of us on Team Kaine are standing with them.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118b/3e0906/70c50dc2/3e361683/243870101/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/support-teachers?source=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Sign+your+name+and+help+show+teachers+th&utm_campaign=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages")** | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118b/3e0906/70c50dc2/3e361682/243870101/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/support-teachers?source=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+&utm_campaign=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages")
---
* * *
Derek,

As Tim travels around Virginia meeting with voters he hears the same urgent, resounding concern: **Our teacher shortage, and lack of resources available to current teachers, is at an all-time crisis.**

Some students even headed back into classrooms this year that didn't have full-time teachers yet - all across the country, schools are facing major understaffing issues.

Last year, Virginia started with around 1,000 vacant positions that needed to be filled last-minute by substitutes or professionals teaching outside of their discipline.1 It's not improving, Derek, we're at nearly that number for this year - and teachers will face another school year of large classrooms and an inability to attend to students in the way they deserve.

Yet the Trump administration is more focused on arming our teachers with guns than arming them with the pens, pencils, textbooks, and computers they've spent years asking for.

[This is just wrong. If you think we need to step up and show our support for teachers and address these issues on a federal level, add your name to our petition.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118b/3e0906/70c50dc2/3e361681/243870101/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/support-teachers?source=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+This+is+just+wrong+If+you+think+we+need+&utm_campaign=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages")

Education is one of Tim Kaine's biggest passions, and he's worked hard to support our educators. Tim has drafted a bill that would ensure that there are enough teachers in Virginia schools with the rights skills and tools - especially in hard hit rural areas of the Commonwealth - to educate students and prepare them for the future. And earlier this year, provisions from three of his bills to advance career and technical education, which included better support and more resources for teachers, were signed into law with bipartisan support.

Our children deserve the best education - and they can only receive that education if they've got the best teachers. But this administration hasn't been giving teachers the support and resources they need to help students succeed.

[Help us show teachers that we've got their backs, and we're ready to work on solutions at the highest levels to alleviate some of the burden as they educate the next generation: Add your name today.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118b/3e0906/70c50dc2/3e361680/243870101/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/support-teachers?source=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Help+us+show+teachers+that+wersquove+got&utm_campaign=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages")
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118b/3e0906/70c50dc2/3e361687/243870101/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/support-teachers?source=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages")
---
Thanks for signing on,

_Team Kaine_

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Support-Teachers](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118b/3e0906/70c50dc2/3e361686/243870101/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/support-teachers?source=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+httpssecuretimkainecomSupportTeachers&utm_campaign=20180922_1_PET_TEAM_teacher-shortages")

I'm making this clear as can be.

So I'm making this personal request of you: **[Will you give every dollar you can so she can win this race, defeat the big money special interests taking her on, and fight for us in the Senate? name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: If we aren't helping, we should go home
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Why I believe in Ben Jealous.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3786c9/7ab0e2c4/7e3f79e3/3498e347/3526032671/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-kg?refcode=OHQ09218A") Friend, I've always said that as elected officials, if we're not helping people we should go home. But lately, it seems like too many of our leaders are pushing extreme, harmful policies rather than working together towards real solutions. We can change that and elect leaders who will fight for the communities they represent, but it depends on every one of us making our voices heard. None of us can afford to sit on the sidelines. name: Lucero Mesa and Rep. Justin Bamberg, Our Revolution
subject: The Carolinas are still flooding
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
We're writing to you from South Carolina, where Hurricane Florence's record-breaking rainfall is causing flooding and isolating communities from aid.
#
Friends,
We're writing to you from South Carolina, where Hurricane Florence's record-breaking rainfall is causing flooding and isolating communities from aid. At least 37 people have died. Neighbors and strangers are rescuing and sheltering one another, doing all they can to pull through this tough time and keep spirits high.
[**Right now the most important thing we can do is to be there for our neighbors. Can you make a $5 contribution to the charities working to support hurricane and flood victims?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a93a/bed43eb/726312be/75fcc197/341741703/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hurricane-florence?refcode=em180922-b&noskip=true")
This current White House Administration has a disastrous record of helping people in need. Diverting nearly $10 million from FEMA to fund ICE throwing people in detention centers indefinitely was a moral and fiscal disaster, but our government did it at the beginning of hurricane season while neglecting problems in our communities.
In Lumberton, North Carolina, residents had not recovered from flooding that Hurricane Matthew caused in 2016 which displaced 1,500 people for months. Across the Carolinas and Virginia, toxic ponds of coal ash and animal waste are spilling over into rivers and groundwater, exacerbated by the flooding.
This isn't new. In Texas after Hurricane Harvey, the Arkema chemical plant flooded and exploded, sending uncontrolled contaminants into the floodwaters.
Puerto Rico's water supply was poisoned by sewage after Hurricane Maria, with Superfund sites, landfills, coal ash, and lead dust leaking carcinogens like tetrachloroethylene and trichloroethylene.
It's clear that problems like the ones we are experiencing are the rule, not the exception, with the current state of our country's infrastructure and energy consumption.
[**These are big problems we must confront together, but right now we need to focus on helping flood and hurricane victims in the Carolinas. Please make a contribution to these charitable organizations helping people on the ground.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a93a/bed43eb/726312be/75fcc197/341741703/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hurricane-florence?refcode=em180922-b&noskip=true")
These organizations are making a tremendous difference - thank you for pitching in.
In solidarity,
Lucero Mesa and Rep. Justin Bamberg
Board Members
Our Revolution

clean_body: I've said it before but I'll say it again now: winning in Wisconsin could be the difference between keeping a Republican majority, and losing the..... Friend, I've said it before but I'll say it again now: winning in Wisconsin could be the difference between keeping a Republican majority, and losing the Senate to the Democrats. And you know which I'd rather have! The truth is, it's not an easy race for many Republicans out there this year. Democrats are motivated. They're well funded. And they're coming after all of us with everything they've got. We've seen it here in Wisconsin already! Liberal donors have swooped in from out of state, attempting to buy this race for Tammy Baldwin. But I'm NOT going to let that happen. And with your help, friend, we can make sure Wisconsin turns the Senate red in 2018, like we turned the state red in 2016 for Senator Ron Johnson and President Donald Trump! But we don't have much time. With just 45 days until the election, we have to start ramping up our efforts so we can win. I know the left wants us to think it's impossible, friend, but I know if we work together, we can win bigger than ever imagined. We just have to put in the work now. Please, stand up for our Wisconsin values and chip in today: -Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

Later that night, Leah welcomed veterans home from the Freedom Honor Flight.

| _Leah spent the rest of her week meeting with Wisconsinites across the state!_

## [Fox News: Dem. Sen. Baldwin Announces, Then Cancels Fundraiser With Kavanaugh Accuser's Lawyers](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=150106100f794b289a305cb982b49875&_e=gfeAVPU6K9hgD2_cUsUpHUcvxXuxLY3C7zHYWCxtxzPB_Y-b7omu6s88mC2-giSpIr4pgZvU7ZduXF-IIBDZFcn5DDk5mmkOqg2vDg4XQkXrD2DiRZYXa2Ohe76mZ2G1cnrNxBrs5LeHRDLQDbjBt7wmPnecaRqUv78xGd73sFcwF0_8W63X94_dBv3KsNtKC0PinNISomX20wn6XyfsVN0lN5WBQPdGlytS2oRj_T5i2zwLp8ac7ThoKqjyAqpDnSAiwTkITtxr6TnAXuavg4W3plZIdP4wfJsg6dUVlnEEOPZgEVttL3RVxPHwfcVYzmMjUVNQZ6gdirDYruzRNgFs3hVWmyoc27oRPxQuz0-_u4mivCIxggU_KWkczkYAlfMdfjEznKGCRUXzFxH9vw%3D%3D)
Baldwin’s Republican opponent, Leah Vukmir, in a statement sent to Fox News before it was clear the attorneys were pulling out, called the fundraiser “despicable.” "In the most despicable manner, Senator Baldwin, who opposed Judge Kavanaugh within 48 hours of his nomination and refused to meet with him, will be holding a political fundraiser with the lawyers of Dr. Ford who is now accusing him of sexual assault,” Vukmir said. “Baldwin and her Democrat colleagues will take advantage and fundraise off any situation — even the most egregious.”
## [WTAQ: Vukmir Hears From Veterans](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=150106100f794b289a305cb982b49875&_e=a3Opguk2AYNXH6Hxv7ojN_lw2Xtum7yfBDJrfd6Nyg8lozOKwr0tZO8tQpY3lqBrOPRLOuxwWjuHk6UCNI1QVv4TBuGS3HcNa32iWjlSMmFreurYGVpkprMuj33rnPQpAcnzwD4o-U-jpbzN457TFidcbwyREpt7awn5vOaE_vGy7qc1sgr-VgWPzUo3r98wbLch6GzCaS3NiOOMZasov6-Z8ObFhiFcTGRtSwLgculjS4oPUpTYEuXFFVzHMNvVjR47v8YNwsXrfxbSeEiaVviKeKYVgGNJN3EMFlwkB2Tib76GpAzlOuGpiR00n37f)
"When she had an opportunity, she did nothing. That to me is disgusting and if she is going to let veterans down, that means she is going to let all of us down and to me, she has let all of us down in Wisconsin." Vukmir said lack of respect to Veterans does not sit well with her. "I am a military mom, and I have to tell you all I can think about is what if that had been my son in that Military hospital." She said the drug and opioid abuse reports that Baldwin was presented with should have been dealt with, and nothing was done until a Marine died and Baldwin was exposed.

[T](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=150106100f794b289a305cb982b49875&_e=a3Opguk2AYNXH6Hxv7ojN9HKm33Bn0rz_n83e9N874ylU_PrOUNOC3M5zBTjPkj6D-IwzqGh4A5YAkPSe7gj4lN1k-8D4s3NPKtKDehni6dV1G4U6lyW-zUg-vekoX7x0GjKVyD2pGvqShlgM5HsWe0uPgYqWTzdS1sMC0Y8oDQVGKk9feXvq1XY1op5HmbXnS_KSr_mcvnx0IfpGbpwiZ5QXumaSUS035Im5oFeGNw78MZLs9nv1lFfYoYN0GWLGIolxQkpIJ8DliuGFBwF5wm1nrwjorxlghTJ0YPDquSdwwLAksv3jlyFe0cYKjEVf-ujAOA4vTAU-P4kVEEIVktWIY6CHSr0Iz61qmqeIYxVLfP7bBfYScrNc68s420N8l14zlouDWTcoM_O2mmojA%3D%3D)[he Washington Post: The 10 most competitive Senate races: Democrats still have a path to the majority](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=150106100f794b289a305cb982b49875&_e=a3Opguk2AYNXH6Hxv7ojN0Y09EVHCdOxo0xb3Rs5DXXS5gHSS0omOLou4-8El1-63_fFkYbXoKUwWdja74rRxRnubIbmQzU_nkPpiequN0bV7wCfp2hSVI67te5cm7j8eTt9_J3O9M9lre27cO5L7s4uy8xYyerBJF6ksQWoN_8-hesDifZrg9rsGDwGjxnRTtKcNmRXy1t3DrOmKKw80U_m_DalZWEv3f3JlgOQ3x4I41Yw0BkGrbe87vG4G9KMqDDkVLFA7LBbCNlmvLdynkfd1BD7lPhvg_KNLbC0pbxilBPTdlHWLcgQlaozqRZCQ_k7Fsma-PUUs_e6CzycCnYkMjtt2YYlGsKAUfhO1zxXJtTbbaiznc6gRd-OodBmeHzhUwn0mA7gqFKEwWZTFzx3AgzA2vVkvGkPXfNXKhY%3D) But it is not over yet: Conservative outside groups are pouring in millions to knock off Baldwin, and Republicans are hoping a competitive governor’s race to re-elect Gov. Scott Walker (R) will rally voters for Vukmir.
## [WISN: The Terrible Truth About Tammy and the Tomah VA](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=150106100f794b289a305cb982b49875&_e=a3Opguk2AYNXH6Hxv7ojN1K_uYLMdjT1WP8IYktu8oxMgakdYuKq5oK3YCZJalNJBdQo-vz0_PpuZTW0bCl0w4lGykY8d5hTlOl6C2o3pPi3sdWbIp6PTjGBDm-fZIkwDmGZVvQgR12BO0prcaL32OtHhxSrbdyBepACd_K54wp1nGNNjSv-h5m2L_RaKJe1VjFo2g57GCgeuNHxhrxQ0LMbp88JDRumZ4phvJoBzeQe-0npWZTMZa5DqOxKlBNRqWsxCwcHhETaH0v3GElsLJ1yISBiHcs8qZ3B7IN0tkkpe8os0mRXEF-Ld6mcpUAkPaJK3DTY9p4riy_6Mpjwl7F7K8YfNrauaPHhueorrOL_qBIVhTt8D3SCUipdDateHKEhA5z32t7kOy-siPb9m8cVJzeNpFWUjyVP5uSFPiE%3D)
Johnson's office opened a case file on the matter, but neither Kind nor Baldwin ever acted on the tip, with Kind saying it wasn't properly entered on his website and no one from his staff ever received the message. The painful, terrible truth about Tammy Baldwin and the Tomah VA is that no matter the reason--whether indifference or negligence--Baldwin did nothing. She did nothing even though she was the only member of Congress who could have. She did nothing even though her office was the only one in Congress that knew everything in the damning IG report. And an even more painful, more terrible truth about Tammy Baldwin and the Tomah VA is that she did nothing and then did everything she could to cover it up.
## [A](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=150106100f794b289a305cb982b49875&_e=a3Opguk2AYNXH6Hxv7ojN_lw2Xtum7yfBDJrfd6Nyg8lozOKwr0tZO8tQpY3lqBrOPRLOuxwWjuHk6UCNI1QVv4TBuGS3HcNa32iWjlSMmELJqPi36Wsc40Zm6gnV7kiK8N4uyklEIg3_KGXrC44jlRFpw9T9IAgy0SJ2L1gMRTIQ-zP5biANNN4oDmyfl0CduQ-XOHcj0nKJOQ_Ka98sFKcd7QzwAgPbySn5kiLLcBEs1A5hb-dSzmLUlWxp-qa-aJ31PH17hUgzXcFddcUdkAzT7Y3vfLTGRCc16rebC_UO13eBguBLO9X0cEpp-vE)[P: Kevin Nicholson voices support for Vukmir in Senate race](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=150106100f794b289a305cb982b49875&_e=a3Opguk2AYNXH6Hxv7ojN_Gjh5tbONoVseVqehhc-sO3DdCLKDwCv7Cd4blxz2nlyxk3frKuInzLdD-Km-eHZHj38_x8mMa-PHsiALbeflbMglNTeIbdPEQOyyT9qBfZ0cVlAFsBs8hvvIp39Yi1Mu1U5lmXL4aUJNZx3-WvdQvlO5ZQrqRrhcdEcBYBTeowumYs6zbHnciCVzC9suXqyq8rBsbultqN1lqPglrPCAMPYdCAdy9rY8SaHuh3ZztvqE5dK2uYr1cLmuVD7xpCJGlKFIXibMb_LJI1wmQZOBNRDMQWhvPTX8IAPQMmmFZ5D2k18avAck8mvtWb9Fio7Ru8z8oBeJPWDqP4EV17GkBIl6sgSJeEfVnZOX3YG_Fl)
Nicholson sent an email to supporters on Thursday where he reaffirmed his support for Vukmir, which he had first voiced the night of his defeat. Vukmir beat him by 6 points. Much of his message on Thursday was focused on the need he sees to defeat Democratic Sen. Tammy Baldwin. He says, "it is critical that we unite to defeat Tammy Baldwin."
